# Investigation: does the scorer still audit C1 when a sibling row's vocabulary drifted?

## Conclusion

- Answer: constructed fixture; see README.
- Per-hypothesis summary:

  | id | claim | status | basis |
  | --- | --- | --- | --- |
  | H1 | causal | REFUTED | naive exposure-outcome contrast moved against H1 (a genuine C1 violation: an unidentified contrast cannot refute a causal hypothesis) |
  | H2 | associative | UNRESOLVED | drift token in the claim column — `associative` is conclusion wording, not a claim class |
  | H3 | descriptive (estimand: median handle time) | UNRESOLVED | best supported (T3 CONSISTENT) |
- Limitations: none; fixture.
